meta.northy_message: Jan's methodology is done — Zig is clear to run. Elgin ISD committed at $18,402. Two things still need you: Ram is ready to run the Mabel data extract (one question), and the ESC-10 proposal is due Friday.

act_now.title: ESC-10 Proposal — Due FRIDAY (3 days)
act_now.detail: Three-bucket partnership greenlit June 23: (1) District revenue share, (2) ESC-10 as paid PD trainer, (3) AI librarian ~$70-80K/yr. This morning's standup focused on capabilities docs — not the proposal itself. 5 open deliverables: Google Sheet of 81 districts, rate card from Lori Aden, Angela Ellis brain dump, IT/tech conversation, full proposal draft. Jan collaborating.
act_now.action: Today: ping Lori for rate card, Angela for brain dump scheduling. Tomorrow: draft proposal. Friday gates July 29 follow-up meeting.

act_now.title: Mabel/Ram Data Extract — One Answer Unblocks 6 Hours of Work
act_now.detail: Ram confirmed all 5 extract files feasible (~4-6h of work). He's ready to run. One question blocking him: for enrollment banding (<1K, 1K-5K, 5K-15K, 15K+), should he use total student count per district (from _CampusToStudent / Student.districtId) as the proxy, or another metric? This is the data that feeds the book intelligence engine and Mabel's sales demo capability.
act_now.action: Reply to Ram's DM in Slack with: 'Yes — use total student count per district from Student.districtId as the enrollment proxy. Run it.' One sentence unlocks the extract.

think_about.title: Engineering Succession — Nahuel Exit Needs Replacement First

intel.title: Senses & Reflexes — Integration Architecture for GBrain
intel.pattern: Recipe format (YAML + markdown). Senses = data inputs. Reflexes = brain state-change triggers. 'Agents ARE the runtime' — recipes ARE the installer.
intel.applies_to: Hermes skill ecosystem — formalizes what Northy does as shareable recipes

intel.title: Two-Stage LLM Pipeline — Propose then Critique
intel.pattern: Stage 1 proposes clusters. Stage 2 critiques/corrects. Dynamic schemas per chunk enforce completeness. Precision-first.
intel.applies_to: Mabel book intelligence / district benchmarking pipeline

intel.title: Skillify — Meta-Extraction Pattern
intel.pattern: 100+ skills. One command extracts repeatable workflows into reusable skills.
